system_prompt: You are a CFD expert. Based on the user requirement and the retrieved similar cases, produce a concise usage guidance. If no suitable case is available, set match_level to 'none' and advise not to rely on similar case templates.
user_prompt:
User requirement:
Perform a 3D Bernard Cell simulation using OpenFOAM buoyantFoam solver. The computational domain spans 9 m x 1 m x 2 m. The simulation begins at t=0 seconds and runs until t = 1000 seconds with a time step of 1 second, and results are written at intervals of every 50 seconds. One wall has a temperature of 310 K, while the other has a temperature of 300 K.

Case info:
case name: BernardCells
case domain: heatTransfer
case category: RAS
case solver: buoyantFoam

Selected similar case:
BernardCells | heatTransfer | None | buoyantFoam | score=0.04610627889633179

Top candidates:
- BernardCells | heatTransfer | None | buoyantFoam | score=0.04610627889633179
- buoyantCavity | heatTransfer | None | buoyantFoam | score=0.38437420129776
- hotRadiationRoom | heatTransfer | None | buoyantFoam | score=0.42067795991897583
- circuitBoardCooling | heatTransfer | None | buoyantFoam | score=0.4247305691242218
- hotRoom | heatTransfer | None | buoyantFoam | score=0.42752087116241455

Return JSON with keys: match_level (high/medium/low/none), use_scope, advice.
response: match_level='high' use_scope='All files from the reference BernardCells case (system/controlDict, system/fvSchemes, system/fvSolution, constant/thermophysicalProperties, constant/turbulenceProperties, constant/g, and 0/ boundary files) can be used as direct templates; adapt blockMeshDict for the 9×1×2 m domain, controlDict for endTime=1000s, deltaT=1s, writeInterval=50, and modify temperature boundary conditions to 310 K and 300 K on the respective heated/cooled walls.' advice='Use the retrieved BernardCells tutorial case as a full template since it matches exactly in case type, solver, and physics; copy its directory structure and modify only the mesh dimensions (9 m × 1 m × 2 m), time-control parameters (endTime 1000s, deltaT 1s, writeInterval 50), and thermal boundary condition values (310 K and 300 K).'
